mapper.select: SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS todayAccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE DATE(detected_time) = CURDATE()) AS alertCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status IN ('NEW','ACKNOWLEDGED')) AS unresolvedAlertCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE is_active = 'Y') AS activeSourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE) AS totalSourceCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG) AS totalAccessCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'SELECT' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS selectCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'UPDATE' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS updateCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'DELETE' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS deleteCount, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE action_type = 'DOWNLOAD' AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS downloadCount, (SELECT MAX(last_collect_time) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE) AS lastCollectTime, (SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(*) = 0 THEN 'N/A' WHEN SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'INVALID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 THEN 'INVALID' ELSE 'VALID' END FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_HASH_VERIFY WHERE verify_date = CURDATE()) AS hashVerifyStatus, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE pii_grade IS NOT NULL AND DATE(access_time) = CURDATE()) AS piiAccessCount
SELECT HOUR(access_time) AS hour, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = #{date} GROUP BY HOUR(access_time) ORDER BY hour
SELECT action_type AS actionType, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = #{date} GROUP BY action_type ORDER BY cnt DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ( source_system_id, user_account, user_name, department, access_time, client_ip, action_type, target_db, target_schema, target_table, target_columns, pii_type_codes, pii_grade, affected_rows, search_condition, sql_text, access_channel, session_id, result_code, hash_value, prev_hash, collected_at, partition_key ) VALUES ( #{sourceSystemId}, #{userAccount}, #{userName}, #{department}, #{accessTime}, #{clientIp}, #{actionType}, #{targetDb}, #{targetSchema}, #{targetTable}, #{targetColumns}, #{piiTypeCodes}, #{piiGrade}, #{affectedRows}, #{searchCondition}, #{sqlText}, #{accessChannel}, #{sessionId}, #{resultCode}, #{hashValue}, #{prevHash}, NOW(), DATE_FORMAT(#{accessTime}, '%Y%m%d') )

INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ( source_system_id, user_account, user_name, department, access_time, client_ip, action_type, target_db, target_schema, target_table, target_columns, pii_type_codes, pii_grade, affected_rows, search_condition, sql_text, access_channel, session_id, result_code, hash_value, prev_hash, collected_at, partition_key ) VALUES
( #{item.sourceSystemId}, #{item.userAccount}, #{item.userName}, #{item.department}, #{item.accessTime}, #{item.clientIp}, #{item.actionType}, #{item.targetDb}, #{item.targetSchema}, #{item.targetTable}, #{item.targetColumns}, #{item.piiTypeCodes}, #{item.piiGrade}, #{item.affectedRows}, #{item.searchCondition}, #{item.sqlText}, #{item.accessChannel}, #{item.sessionId}, #{item.resultCode}, #{item.hashValue}, #{item.prevHash}, NOW(), DATE_FORMAT(#{item.accessTime}, '%Y%m%d') )
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, s.source_name AS sourceName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE s ON a.source_system_id = s.source_id WHERE a.log_id = #{logId}

where.if: AND (a.user_account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.target_table LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, s.source_name AS sourceName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE s ON a.source_system_id = s.source_id
ORDER BY a.access_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a
SELECT hash_value FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG ORDER BY log_id DESC LIMIT 1
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE
AND (source_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR db_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE SET source_name = #{sourceName}, source_type = #{sourceType}, db_name = #{dbName}, db_type = #{dbType}, hostname = #{hostname}, port = #{port}, schema_name = #{schemaName}, description = #{description}, collect_interval = #{collectInterval}, table_filter = #{tableFilter}, exclude_accounts = #{excludeAccounts}, is_active = #{isActive}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId} WHERE source_id = #{sourceId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT ( rule_id, rule_code, severity, alert_title, alert_detail, target_user_id, target_user_name, related_log_ids, status ) VALUES ( #{ruleId}, #{ruleCode}, #{severity}, #{alertTitle}, #{alertDetail}, #{targetUserId}, #{targetUserName}, #{relatedLogIds}, 'NEW' )
mapper.select: SELECT a.*, r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id WHERE a.alert_id = #{alertId}

where.if: AND (a.alert_title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR a.target_user_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id
ORDER BY a.detected_time DESC LIMIT #{offset}, #{amount}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a
SELECT a.*, r.rule_name AS ruleName FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT a LEFT JOIN COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE r ON a.rule_id = r.rule_id ORDER BY a.detected_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE ORDER BY sort_order, rule_code
mapper.update: UPDATE COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT_RULE SET rule_name = #{ruleName}, description = #{description}, severity = #{severity}, condition_type = #{conditionType}, threshold_value = #{thresholdValue}, time_window_min = #{timeWindowMin}, time_range_start = #{timeRangeStart}, time_range_end = #{timeRangeEnd}, target_action = #{targetAction}, target_pii_grade = #{targetPiiGrade}, is_active = #{isActive}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, upd_user_id = #{updUserId} WHERE rule_id = #{ruleId}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_id = #{configId}
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_key = #{configKey}
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_CONFIG WHERE config_type = #{configType} ORDER BY sort_order

SELECT PARTITION_NAME AS partitionName, PARTITION_DESCRIPTION AS partitionDescription, TABLE_ROWS AS tableRows FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'COTDL' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_ACCESS_LOG' AND PARTITION_NAME IS NOT NULL ORDER BY PARTITION_ORDINAL_POSITION
SELECT TABLE_ROWS FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.PARTITIONS WHERE TABLE_SCHEMA = 'COTDL' AND TABLE_NAME = 'TBL_ACCESS_LOG' AND PARTITION_NAME = #{partitionName}
SELECT * FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_SOURCE WHERE is_active = 'Y'
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG_ALERT WHERE status = 'NEW'

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS accessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS accessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE DATE(access_time) = CURDATE() AND TIME(access_time) BETWEEN #{timeStart} AND #{timeEnd} GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS deniedCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) AND result_code = 'DENIED' GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, COUNT(*) AS piiAccessCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) AND pii_grade = #{piiGrade} GROUP BY user_account, user_name HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT user_account AS userAccount, user_name AS userName, target_table AS targetTable, COUNT(*) AS repeatCount, GROUP_CONCAT(DISTINCT log_id ORDER BY log_id LIMIT 10) AS logIds FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{timeWindowMin} MINUTE) GROUP BY user_account, user_name, target_table HAVING COUNT(*) > #{threshold}

SELECT a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, a.client_ip AS clientIp, a.log_id AS logId FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a WHERE a.access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND a.client_ip NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT client_ip FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 90 DAY) AND access_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND user_account = a.user_account ) GROUP BY a.user_account, a.user_name, a.client_ip

SELECT a.user_account AS userAccount, a.user_name AS userName, a.log_id AS logId, a.access_time AS accessTime FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG a WHERE a.access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) AND a.user_account NOT IN ( SELECT DISTINCT user_account FROM COTDL.TBL_ACCESS_LOG WHERE access_time >= DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL #{inactiveDays} DAY) AND access_time < DATE_SUB(NOW(), INTERVAL 1 HOUR) ) GROUP BY a.user_account, a.user_name
